up_to_ts.description: Acknowledge every alert at or before this ISO-8601 UTC instant. When omitted, acknowledges up to the newest alert currently in the log (or 'now' if the log is empty/unreadable) — the common 'dismiss what I've seen' case. Monotonic: a watermark already past this instant is left alone, so a stale call never resurrects acknowledged alerts.
up_to_ts.title: Up To Ts
